name: Gilbert
message: As told you already, I thank you for all the things you brought to Inensia company but furthermore to your colleagues. I mean by that your kindness, your good mood and your professionalism. I was great to share those 3 years of collaboration. We also had good time off work with the parties and petanque tournament. I wish you all the best for this new professional adventure with lots of successes. I hope that our roads will meet again in the future. I would be very pleased to have some news from you.

name: Ani
message: May the new adventure take you where you want and teach you many interesting things. Be curious and hardworking, healthy and very happy. And we will always be just a click away.
